name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly changes the methodology compared to the old plan. Specifically, it shifts from a Neural ODE approach (Symplectic/RK4) to a supervised force-field training approach with curriculum learning. The data preprocessing steps now include computing ground-truth acceleration vectors, which were not part of the original plan. Given these fundamental changes in the training strategy and model architecture, the previous execution steps are not compatible with the new requirements. Therefore, the plan must be restarted from the beginning.
